productDisplayName: Wrangler Women Short Placket Green Top
description: CompositionGreen round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with shoulder panels, short placket with one button, mildly puffed cap sleeves, printed chest panel with mild gathers on either side of the bust, cuffed hemline with mild gathers and embroidered brand name at back neckFittingComfortWash care Handwash in cold water Do not machine wash Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Indulge your feminine side with this green top from wrangler. The printed chest panel, short placket and mildly puffed sleeves enhance your dainty, feminine look, while the shoulder panels add style and structure to your shoulders. The cuffed hemline can sit snug around your waist allowing the fabric to fall free around, or simply pull the hemline down to create a different style statement. Team this with jeans or white pants and ballerina flats for a cool casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
